title: Tighten FlexPay eligibility check for Standard tier
author: marcus.webb
head: marcus/standard-eligibility
description: Per PLAN-1925 + Brett's UDAAP-readiness checklist. Standard tier requires: 18+ months on the card, no >30dpd in last 12mo, FICO at-or-above the model floor. Returns True if eligible.

planted_bug.summary: Conditions are joined with `or` instead of `and`. Cardmembers satisfying ANY ONE of (tenure, delinquency, fico) are marked eligible — instead of requiring all three. Will let through ~3-4x more members than the underwriting model approved.

files.diff:
+from datetime import date
+
+from flexpay.types import Cardmember
+
+STANDARD_TENURE_MONTHS = 18
+STANDARD_MAX_DPD = 30
+STANDARD_FICO_FLOOR = 680
+
+
+def is_eligible_standard(member: Cardmember, today: date) -> bool:
+    """Standard-tier eligibility for FlexPay plan creation.
+
+    Approved by underwriting 2026-04-30 (see PLAN-1925 + RISK-1102).
+    """
+    months_on_card = (today - member.account_opened).days // 30
+    has_tenure = months_on_card >= STANDARD_TENURE_MONTHS
+    clean_delinquency = member.max_dpd_last_12mo <= STANDARD_MAX_DPD
+    fico_ok = member.current_fico >= STANDARD_FICO_FLOOR
+
+    return has_tenure or clean_delinquency or fico_ok
